summary: Case History Feature Testing Complete - Backend: 23/25 tests passed (92%), Frontend: All UI flows verified. Case history wizard with 11 sections working correctly. Session notes properly blocked without completed case history.

success_rate.backend: 92% (23/25 tests passed, 2 skipped due to client creation status code mismatch)

seed_data_creation: Test clients created with TEST_ prefix during testing for case history validation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Case History feature fully tested. All 11 sections working. Session notes properly blocked without completed case history.

case_history_create.notes: Creates case history with all 11 sections. Prevents duplicates.

case_history_get.notes: Returns full case history with all sections.

case_history_section_update.notes: Auto-save functionality for individual sections. Creates case history if not exists.

case_history_complete.notes: Validates required fields: name, main_problems, informed_consent_taken.

session_notes_blocking.notes: Session notes creation blocked with 400 error if case history missing or incomplete. Manual verification confirmed blocking works correctly.

security.notes: Only therapists can access case history endpoints.

all_sections.notes: All 11 sections can be updated: basic_identification, presenting_complaints, history_of_present_illness, past_psychiatric_history, medical_history, family_history, personal_developmental_history, mental_status_examination, provisional_formulation, initial_therapy_plan, consent_disclaimer

elements_verified: Warning message displayed when client has no case history
Warning text: 'No case history exists for this client. You must complete the initial case history before creating session notes.'
Basic Identification form with name, DOB, marital status, occupation, address, contact fields

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/case-history/check/{client_id} - Check if case history exists
PATCH /api/case-history/{client_id}/complete - Mark case history as complete
POST /api/session-notes - Blocked without completed case history

test_1.scenario: Create session note without case history
test_1.result: 400 - 'Case history must be completed before creating session notes. Please complete the initial case history first.'

test_2.scenario: Create session note with incomplete case history
test_2.result: 400 - 'Case history is incomplete. Please complete all required sections and mark it as complete before creating session notes.'

test_3.scenario: Create session note with complete case history
